title: Lafarge Africa Sustain Growth … As 2025 Third Quarter Profit After Tax Surges By 246% - FinancialEDGE
description: Lafarge Africa Plc released its third quarter unaudited financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025, showcasing impressive growth driven by strong topline expansion and significant margin accretion. html:
Lafarge Africa Plc released its third quarter  unaudited financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025, showcasing impressive growth driven by strong topline expansion and significant margin accretion.

The company’s profit after tax jumped by 246% year-on-year to N207.78 billion in the first nine months of 2025, reflecting sustained volume growth, operational excellence, and innovative product offerings.

Highlight of the result shows that revenue expanded by 43.3% year-on-year to N263.51 billion, with nine months 2025 revenue growing 62.6% year-on-year to N780.49 billion.

Management attributed the strong topline to improved volumes and enhanced plant reliability, with capacity utilisation improving by c.7.0%.
